titleStmt.title: SII 15.46: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 46. (B.K. No. 115 of 1929-30.) SĀLAVĀḌIGI, BAGEVADI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a broken slab standing near the entrance to the Masjid.

It states that Sāmanta Horeyama, the Taḷāṟa of Mānyakhēḍa and a subordinate of the Rāshṭrakūṭa king Śubhatuṅga-Vallabha Akālavarsha Kṛishṇarāja, had construc- ted at Sālavāḍige, the temple of Horeyamēśvara and that subsequently the temple was completely renovated by Kāśmīrabrati Mūṟujāvi Muni who also built in it two shrines for the gods Siddhēśvara and Pāpavināśa. It registers a grant of land made by Āchikabbe, daughter of Mūliga Mākamayya, to Daṇḍanāyaka Barmmayya, the Maneverggaḍe of the king Jagadēkamalla, as Paramēśvaradatti for the temple. Other gifts by the four Ūroḍeyas of Vāji-vamśa and Three-hundred Sāligas of the village are also recorded.

In the Rāshṭrakūṭa dynasty, three kings bearing the name Kṛishṇa are associated with the title Akālavarsha, the first two of whom also bore the epithet Śubhatuṅga As Kṛishṇa I would be too early, Kṛishṇa II appears to have been referred to in the early part of the epigraph.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namaśśivāya © namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
śrīramaṇānvayaprabhava rāṣṭrakuḷakke maṇipradīpakaṁ cārucaritradoḷnṛpatirūpamanu bratiraṭṭarā
jya lakṣmīramaṇīviḷāsa garuḍadhvajanādinarēṁdralīleyiṁ dhāriṇiyaṁ jagaṁ pogaḷe pāḷisidaṁ śubhatuṁga
vallabhaṁ . nriparo raṁ kaliyugapradhvaṁsanaṁ geyyalādaradiṁ baṁdanō dēvalōkadinenalbhūlōka sā
mrājyamaṁ hariśau¨ryyaṁ ḷaṁ nṟipāḷatiḷakaṁ śrī rāṣṭrakūṭānvayaṁ dhara yoḷpōlva narēṁdrarārene jagaṁ taṁnaṁ
karaṁ kaṁnaraṁ . Ā negaḷdakālava¨rṣō¨rbbīnāthaṁ cakrava¨rttimaṇināyakanāvēna nā naḷanā nṛganā nahuṣane
rājaguṇavaṁ merevaṁ . śrī kṛṣṇarājakaṭakaprākāraṁ birudavairisāmantama dānēka gāri dha¨rmmapa
tākaṁ sāmaṁtanikara mukhamaṇimukuraṁ . śrīmatkṛṣṇanarēṁdrabhūribhujadaṁḍōccaṁḍa kaukṣēyakaṁ sāmaṁ
tōttamanantanāyakana mitrōdbhītisaṁdāyakaṁ sāmaṁtāgraṇi mānyakhēḍada taḷāraṁ raṭṭarājyadviṣatsāmaṁta
praḷeyāntakaṁ horeyamaṁ sāmantasaṁkraṁdanaṁ . bhūmigaḷaṁkṛtiyene nijanāma diniḷepogaḷe sāḷavāḍigeyoḷsaṁgrā
mamuravairi �rayamasāmantaṁ māḍidaṁ mahēśvaragṛhamaṁ . Uttamamāṇikēśvarada kōla gaḍiṁbada mattaraṁ jasaṁ muttina maṁ
ḍapaṁ genalsubhatuṁganarēṁdranoldu mūvattaniḷānutaṁ horeyamēśvara dēva gṛhakke koṭṭanudvṛttanṛpāḷamattagajakēsari sa¨rvvana
masyavṛti yiṁ . yatitiḷakaṁ kaśmīrabrati tējānvayatapasvi śivadha¨rmmapadasthitikaraṇō dita rudrā�tiśivayati mū
ṟujāvimunimaṇirājaṁ . khaḷasaṁghaṭṭadinaghahaṭṭiḷeyoḷaḍaṁgi[¨rddu] horeyamēśvaragṛhamaṁ taḷadaṁ punaḥpratiṣṭhāviḷasana
maṁ mūrujāvimuni māḍisidaṁ . kṣiti pogaḷe mūrujāvibrati tatprāsādadalli māḍi danakhiḷōṁ�ne siddhēśvara viśrutapāpavi
nāśadēvabhavanadvayamaṁ . śrī siddhēśvaradēvanivāsābhyudayābhivṛddhi pāpavināśa śrī sa[¨rvva]saṁmṛddhiya śōbhāsura dha¨rmmā¨rtthavesaye ni
ja puruṣā¨rtthaṁ . nū¨rmmaḍi tailapānvaya caḷukyakuḷa jagadēkamalladēva¨rmmanu jēṁdra ruṁdrapadadoḷsukhadiṁdire
rājarakṣitaṁ dha¨rmmavideṁdu biṁnavisutaṁ manave¨rggeḍe daṁḍanāyakaṁ ba¨rmmayaṁge tanmata dinā paramēśvaradattiyeṁbinaṁ .
mūliga mākamayyana magaḷjagadoḷnegaḷdācikabbe nīḷāḷaki bācikabbe vaḷado ḷnijavṛttiya hattumattaraṁ kōlalu mā
ṇikēśvaranenalsale koṭṭaḷudāttakī¨rtti dikpāḷakaraneyde dha¨rmmavidu sa¨rvvanamasyava nuttamōttamam . Uḷi
dāghāṭamanā keyyoḷagaṇa haḷḷamanagalci kaḍunigaranunoḷvaḷasiṁge yōgyavappadanaḷatige maṁnisu
varoldu matta¨rhattaṁ . śrīyuta yājñavalkivinutaśṟutimā¨rgganabhōmaṇi pradīpāyita dha¨rṁmani¨rṁmma
ḷavivēkavirājitameṁba vaṁśadoḷsāyirabāhusāhasasamagrarudāragabhīrasārarātrēya pavitragōtra
śatapatradivākararanyabhīkarar . kuladabhivṛddhiyaṁ taḷadu va¨rggada nālkumodalgaḷanta yōjvaḷanaya bhadra
rāgiyu bigu¨rvvina vājigaḷāśritā¨rdrani¨rmmaḷarenisi¨rddu vidvatteyiṁ gōtrapavitrariḷājanōtsavaṁ nela
sida sāḷavāḍigeya saccaritaprabhugaḷ . Abhimānaṁ manuja ḷnaradudo bhāraṁ nirākāramaṁ vibha
vāḷaṁkṛtavāgigoṁḍudu caraṁ pratyakṣavāyteṁbinaṁ śubhasaṁpaṁsanayōṁnatānvaya guṇa¨rvvi
khyātivetti¨rppa satprabhugaḷ rūḍhiya sāḷavāḍigeya rājadvājivaṁśōdbhavar . buddhipuruṣā
¨rtthasā¨rtthasamṛddhicaritraṁparā¨rtthavenipa¨rnnayasaṁpaddha¨rmmacatussamayasamuddharaṇa¨rnnega
ḷda nālku modalūroḍeyar sale nile siddhanātha paramēśvara pāpavināśadēva maṁgaḷa gṛha
caitrapa¨rvvada pavitraviḷāsada līlegoṁḍu dīvaḷigeya pa¨rvvadaṁdaravaneṇneyanokkalokka loḷoṁdu hā
gamaṁ phaḷayutamānyavaṁ gosedittariḷānuta paṭṭasāligaru [.] Ī nēsaruvī tiṁgaḷu vī nelanaṁ kūḍe nilvinaṁ hāga
manoldānateripugaḷsāliga mūnū¨rvvaru biṭṭarittarolvara neṁṭaru .

paramā¨rtthaṁ daśadha¨rmmani¨rmmaḷatapaḥśrīsatkulaśrīniraṁtaritaṁ saccaritaṁ nayaṁ vinaya vādācā¨ryyarācā¨ryyaruccaritācā
¨ryyaranā¨ryyareṁdu maṭhadoḷniṣṭhānvitācā¨ryyaraṁ gurugaḷmāḍi sada¨rtthavaṁ nilisuva¨rgrāmēśarī dha¨rmmamaṁ . Osedī
dha¨rmmavanoldu rakṣisidavaṁ caṁdrā¨rkkaruḷḷannegaṁ jasamaṁ tāḷdi surēṁdrarājya pathadūḷniściṁtavi¨rkkuṁ dayāvasathaṁ
parītavṛttiyinadhōyānakke salguṁ guṇi maguḷdātavivēkanaṁ paḷiguvī lōkaṁ gataśrīkanaṁ . sā
mānyōyaṁ dha¨rmmasētu¨rnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sa¨rvvānē tānbhāvinaḥ pā¨rtthivēṁdrānbhūyō bhūyō
yācatē rāmacaṁdra . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yōharēta vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭhi¨rvva¨rṣa sahasrāṇi
viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 15.46 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
